name: Kuro
description: Kuro is a Servamp ( a vampire + servant). He was named Kuro, by his Eve, [Mahiru Shirota](https://anilist.co/character/87273/Mahiru-Shirota), is the Servamp of Sloth. He is the oldest of the eight Servamps. When he is exposed to sunlight, he transforms into a black cat. Being the Servamp of Sloth, Kuro spends his time sleeping, lazing around or playing video games. name: Kuro

name: Worick Arcangelo
nativeName: ウォリック・アルカンジェロ
description: One half of Benriya, Worick is the more personable and communicative partner. He presents himself as fairly happy-go-lucky, but can be serious when a job is on the line. Worick works as both a freelance gangster and gigolo in order to pay the rent. In chapter seven it is revealed that he has exceptional recall abilities. He is the second son and only surviving member of the influential Arcangelo family.

name: Kongming Zhuge
description: **Occupation:** Chancellor of Shu Han (Former) Part-Timer (BB Lounge) Manager Zhuge Kongming is the main male protagonist of the Paripi Koumei series. He is the former Chancellor of Shu Han, well-known strategist of the Three Kingdoms Period (220 -280 AD). As his life reached its end at the Battle of the Wuzhong Plains, he wished on his deathbed to be reborn into a world where peace thrives. Thus, he is reborn to modern-day Tokyo, Japan.

name: Mitsuki
description: Mitsuki was created as a synthetic human by [Orochimaru,](https://anilist.co/character/2455/Orochimaru) being cultivated from the same embryo as at least one older "Mitsuki". Just like his "brother", Mitsuki was named after "Tsuki" (杯, Literally meaning: Vessel) and the sixth sign of the Chinese zodiac calendar, "Mi" (巳, Literally meaning: Snake). description: A Third Generation pyrokinetic, the Commander of the Knights of the Ashen Flame, and the younger brother of Shinra Kusakabe.

name: Blair
description: A playful cat with powerful magic that Soul and Maka initially confused for a regular witch. name: Clair Aoki
description: A female freshman from Shuichi's highschool that in the beginning of the series attempts to commit suicide by immolation due to the death of her parents to the hands of a "monster." name: Kayden Break
description: Kayden is a secret agent on the run, who finds himself stuck in the body of a fat old fluffy cat. The strongest unaffiliated person in the world, capable to crush even those trained by the groups, which had accumulated vast amounts of data in their systems over the years. He is teaching Jiwoo about the awakened world as his teacher and coach.

name: Nobuchika Ginoza

An old friend of Shinya's, his hatred for those with high Crime Coefficients and his zeal to oust them from society came from the inability to stop his former partner from becoming a latent criminal. Although he still has a certain degree of trust with Shinya, he holds a dislike for Shinya's Enforcer partner, Masaoka, for unknown reasons.
